solutions.solution: (d) From above, it is clear that only Conclusion I follows.

(b) Methods I
Tests
Exams Questions or Exams Questions
I. No question is a test. (✗)
II. Some tests are exams (✓)
Some exams are tests (I-type)
No exam is a question. (E-type)
First we align the statements by following IEA Rule.
Some exams are tests→Conversion→ Some tests are exams.
Some tests are exams (I-types)
No exam is a question. (E-type)
Statement I = Conclusion II
I + E = O-type conclusion
i.e., some tests are not questions.
Hence, Conclusion I does not follows.
So, only Conclusion II follows.

(d) Apartment Bungalows
House Bungalows or House Apartment
House
or
Bungalows Apartment
I. No house is a bungalow. (✗)
All bungalows being houses is a possibility. (✓)

(e) Insects or Insects Plants Animals Animals
I. All insects being animals is a possibility. (✓)
II. There is a possibility that some animals are neither insects nor plant. (✓)

(c) Ink Pens Eraser
I. No pen is an eraser. (✓)
II. Some erasers are pens. (✗)

(b) Gear Wheel Brake
So, only Conclusion II follows.

(d) Month Year Second
or
Second Month Year
None follows.

(c) Clips Pins
Pins Pens or Clips Pens
I. Some pins are pens. (✗)
II. Some pins are not pens. (✗)
Complementary pair (I-O)

(e) Method I
C A D
I. All Ds are Cs (✓)
II. Some Ds are As. (✓)
